summarization.a: The figure shows the change in MCPC (mass change per cycle) and ΔM (mass change due to HF and TMA) over cycles at 300°C on Al<sub>2</sub>O<sub>3</sub>. The MCPC remains relatively constant while ΔM fluctuates.
summarization.b: The figure displays the ratio of ΔM<sub>TMA</sub> to MCPC over cycles, indicating a constant decrease per ALE cycle.

a.question: What is mass change after HF exposure?
What is the mass change after TMA exposure?
What is the mass change per cycle (MCPC)?
What information can be gained from the ratio of mass change after TMA exposure (ΔM<sub>TMA</sub>) to MCPC?
a.answer: According to the authors, this ratio can be used to gain information about the stoichiometry  of the ALE reactions that occur on the Al2O3 substrate.
